title: Set up Aeneas/Charon to Lean4 verification infrastructure
description: Install Aeneas/Charon as external dev toolchain. Create proofs/ directory with lakefile.lean, lean-toolchain, and Mathlib dependency. Run Charon extraction and Aeneas translation for gfp/ and gfpn/ modules. Add CI job. Risk gate: if Charon cannot handle const generics, fall back to monomorphized wrappers. Success criteria: lake build compiles auto-generated Lean code without errors.
